title: Hadith 1: Intentions
questions: Who is the narrator?
What is the main lesson about intention?
Who narrates from whom, if available?
Complete: إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِ____

title: Hadith 2: Islam, Iman, Ihsan
english: Ihsan is to worship Allah as though you see Him.
questions: Who is the narrator?
What are Islam, Iman, and Ihsan?
Who narrates from whom, if available?
Complete: أَنْ تَعْبُدَ اللَّهَ كَأَنَّكَ ____

title: Hadith 3: The Pillars of Islam
english: Islam is built upon five foundations.
questions: Who is the narrator?
What are the five foundations mentioned?
Who narrates from whom, if available?
Complete: بُنِيَ الإِسْلَامُ عَلَى ____

title: Hadith 4: Human Creation
arabic: إِنَّ أَحَدَكُمْ يُجْمَعُ خَلْقُهُ فِي بَطْنِ أُمِّهِ
english: A person's creation is formed by Allah in the mother's womb.
questions: Who is the narrator?
What does this hadith teach about Allah's knowledge and decree?
Who narrates from whom, if available?
Complete: فِي بَطْنِ ____

title: Hadith 5: Rejected Innovations
arabic: مَنْ أَحْدَثَ فِي أَمْرِنَا هَذَا مَا لَيْسَ مِنْهُ فَهُوَ رَدٌّ
english: A religious matter introduced without basis is rejected.
questions: Who is the narrator?
What is the main lesson about following the Sunnah?
Who narrates from whom, if available?
Complete: فَهُوَ ____
